docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $955.53 FILED BY MONTGOMERY WARD CREDIT CORP AS TO DEFENDANT FLEENOR WALTER C ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-02-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 07
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FLEENOR WALTER C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MONTGOMERY WARD CREDIT CORP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FLEENOR WALTER C $955.53 PRINCIPAL, $57.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,012.53 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOT. OF JUDGMENT TO WALTER FLEENOR RETURNED, NOT KNOWN.
